name: 4p16_1_PCDH7_intragenic_SD
description: Intragenic SD pair flanking PCDH7 on 4p16.1, a member of the protocadherin paralog family. Short tandem duplications of the EC1-EC2 cadherin domains generate paralogous tracts shared with PCDH9 (13q21) and PCDH10 (4q28), creating cross-chromosome paralog confusion in short-read mapping.

architecture.internal_structure: Two intragenic SDs of ~30-50 kb at ~92% identity within PCDH7; EC1-2 ectodomain shares 60-70% protein identity with PCDH9 (chr13) and PCDH10 (chr4q).
